mapper.select: select distinct(sbid) as name from sj_sjpz

select DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m-%d') as name, ROUND(avg(a.dqwdz),2) as value1,ROUND(avg(a.dqsdz),2) as value2,ROUND(avg(a.dqylz),2) as value3,ROUND(avg(a.fspjz),2) as value4 from sj_sjpz_copy a where a.sbid = #{sbid} and a.date between DATE_FORMAT(#{kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59') group by name

select DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m-%d %H') AS name, ROUND(avg(a.dqwdz),2) as value1,ROUND(avg(a.dqsdz),2) as value2,ROUND(avg(a.dqylz),2) as value3,ROUND(avg(a.fspjz),2) as value4 from sj_sjpz_copy a where a.sbid = #{sbid} and a.date between DATE_FORMAT(#{kssj},'%Y-%m-%d') and CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(#{jssj},'%Y-%m-%d'),' 23:59:59') group by name
